name: search_nearby_places
description: Search for places near a given location by type, keyword, or name. Returns place names, addresses, ratings, open status, price levels, and geographic coordinates within a specified radius.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: The latitude and longitude of the center point, comma-separated.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter results by place type (e.g., restaurant, cafe, gas_station, hospital, park).

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: A text string to match against place names, addresses, and reviews.

parameters.name: opennow
parameters.description: Only return places that are currently open.

parameters.name: minprice
parameters.description: Minimum price level (0-4, where 0 is free and 4 is very expensive).

parameters.name: pagetoken
parameters.description: Token from a previous request for fetching the next page of results.
